q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-code-action-smoke.yml','workflow_id':'claude-code-action-smoke.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-864 dispatch Claude Code Action smoke workflow','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem864_queue_claude_action_smoke_dispatch','status':'queued','queue_file':str(q),'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
